title: My Morning Routine
passageText: I wake up at seven o'clock every morning. First, I wash my face and brush my teeth. Then, I eat breakfast with my family. I usually have bread and milk. After breakfast, I put on my uniform and go to school by bus. The bus trip takes about twenty minutes. I like my mornings because they are quiet and peaceful.

comprehensionQuiz.question: What time does the person wake up?
comprehensionQuiz.explanation_id: Teks menyebutkan 'I wake up at seven o'clock every morning'.
comprehensionQuiz.hint_id: Cari kata 'wake up' di kalimat pertama.

comprehensionQuiz.question: What does the person usually have for breakfast?
comprehensionQuiz.explanation_id: Di teks tertulis 'I usually have bread and milk'.
comprehensionQuiz.hint_id: Cari makanan dan minuman setelah kata 'breakfast'.

comprehensionQuiz.question: How does the person go to school?
comprehensionQuiz.explanation_id: Teks menyebutkan 'go to school by bus'.
comprehensionQuiz.hint_id: Cari alat transportasi yang disebutkan di teks.

title: My Best Friend
passageText: My best friend is Sarah. She is tall and has long black hair. She is very kind and funny. We go to the same school, but we are in different classes. We always eat lunch together in the cafeteria. On weekends, we often go to the park or watch movies at my house. I am very happy to have a friend like her.

comprehensionQuiz.question: What does Sarah look like?
options: Tall and has long black hair
Tall and has short brown hair
comprehensionQuiz.explanation_id: Teks menyebutkan 'She is tall and has long black hair'.
comprehensionQuiz.hint_id: Cari deskripsi fisik (ciri-ciri) Sarah di kalimat kedua.

comprehensionQuiz.question: Are they in the same class?
options: No, they are in different classes.
comprehensionQuiz.explanation_id: Di teks tertulis 'we are in different classes'.

comprehensionQuiz.question: Where do they eat lunch?
comprehensionQuiz.explanation_id: Teks menyebutkan 'We always eat lunch together in the cafeteria'.
comprehensionQuiz.hint_id: Cari tempat di mana mereka 'eat lunch'.

title: My Pet Cat
passageText: I have a small pet cat named Luna. She is white with black spots on her back. Luna loves to sleep on my bed. She is very playful and likes to chase small balls. Every morning, she meows loudly because she is hungry. I give her cat food and fresh water. Playing with Luna makes me feel relaxed after a long day at school.

comprehensionQuiz.question: What color is Luna?
comprehensionQuiz.explanation_id: Teks menyebutkan 'She is white with black spots'.
comprehensionQuiz.hint_id: Cari kalimat yang menjelaskan warna Luna.

comprehensionQuiz.question: Why does Luna meow in the morning?
comprehensionQuiz.explanation_id: Teks menyebutkan 'she meows loudly because she is hungry'.

comprehensionQuiz.question: Where does Luna love to sleep?
comprehensionQuiz.explanation_id: Di teks tertulis 'Luna loves to sleep on my bed'.

title: My Favorite Room
passageText: My favorite room in my house is my bedroom. It is not very big, but it is very comfortable. There is a bed, a desk, and a chair. I have a small bookshelf with many interesting books. The walls are painted light blue, which is my favorite color. A large window lets in plenty of sunlight during the day. I do my homework and read books here.

comprehensionQuiz.question: Is the bedroom big?
options: No, it is not very big.
comprehensionQuiz.explanation_id: Teks mengatakan 'It is not very big, but it is very comfortable'.
comprehensionQuiz.hint_id: Cari kalimat tentang ukuran (big/small) kamar tersebut.

comprehensionQuiz.question: What color are the walls?
comprehensionQuiz.explanation_id: Di teks tertulis 'The walls are painted light blue'.

comprehensionQuiz.question: What does the person do in this room?
comprehensionQuiz.explanation_id: Teks menyebutkan 'I do my homework and read books here'.

title: A Visit to the Park
passageText: Yesterday, my family and I went to the city park. The weather was sunny and warm. We brought a picnic basket with sandwiches, apples, and water. Many people were in the park. Some children were flying kites, and others were riding bicycles. We sat under a big tree and enjoyed our food. Later, we walked around the small lake. It was a perfect family day.

comprehensionQuiz.question: What did they bring to the park?
comprehensionQuiz.explanation_id: Teks menyebutkan 'We brought a picnic basket'.

comprehensionQuiz.question: What was the weather like?
comprehensionQuiz.explanation_id: Di teks tertulis 'The weather was sunny and warm'.

comprehensionQuiz.question: Where did they sit to enjoy their food?
comprehensionQuiz.explanation_id: Teks mengatakan 'We sat under a big tree and enjoyed our food'.
